business_purpose: Work unreconciled outpatient encounters or procedures with expected charge opportunity
entry_rule: Encounter has documented performed activity but reconciliation is incomplete
exit_rule: Expected charge posted or explicitly cleared as not required
aging_clock_start_basis: Queue aging starts from governed charge capture stage entry
escalation_trigger: Work item remains open beyond overdue threshold

business_purpose: Route unsupported or under-supported charge opportunities to documentation review
entry_rule: Charge support is incomplete late or inconsistent
exit_rule: Required documentation becomes complete or case is suppressed as nonbillable
aging_clock_start_basis: Queue aging starts from governed documentation deficiency stage entry
escalation_trigger: Documentation support remains incomplete after SLA target

business_purpose: Surface coding-alignment issues before billing finalization
entry_rule: Account workflow stage is coding pending with unresolved coding blocker
exit_rule: Coding blocker resolves or account moves to prebill edit or ready-to-bill
aging_clock_start_basis: Queue aging starts from governed coding review stage entry
escalation_trigger: Coding blocker remains open after overdue threshold

business_purpose: Resolve modifier failures and prebill edits before final billing
entry_rule: Active modifier-related edit or prebill hold exists
exit_rule: Edit or hold resolves without repeat routing
aging_clock_start_basis: Queue aging starts from governed prebill edit or hold stage entry
escalation_trigger: Edit remains open or rerouted after overdue threshold

business_purpose: Track post-final-bill accounts that remain recoverable by correction or rebill
entry_rule: Account is final billed and enters correction or rebill pathway
exit_rule: Correction completes or account becomes financially lost
aging_clock_start_basis: Queue aging starts from governed correction or rebill stage entry
escalation_trigger: Correction or rebill remains open beyond overdue threshold
